'''''Enkidu''''' was a [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ship]] employed by [[K'Armyn Viraxo]] in a mercenary role to intimidate business rivals and defend Viraxo interests against pirates. She was a thorn in her enemies' sides as she always managed to escape from its various missions without damage.

While conducting a hit-and-fade attack against the [[Harlequin Station]] trading post, the ''Enkidu'' and its sister ship the ''[[Gilgam]]'' were driven off by an unexpectedly aggressive [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] piloting his family's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] Corellian light freighter the ''[[Sabra]]''.

A further tense encounter with Ace Azzameen and his brother [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] at [[Dunari's Rest|Dunari's Casino]] further intensified the enmity between the pilot of the ''Enkidu'' and the [[Azzameen family]].

Enkidu was also seen while planting [[Spice/Legends|spice]] in a [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]] cargo area.

The feud was ended when the ''Enkidu'' was destroyed by the Azzameens during a reprisal raid against a [[Viraxo 54|Viraxo facility]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
